target_market_label.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦（O'zstandart / 国家电网）
target_market_label.zht: 烏茲別克斯坦（O'zstandart / 國家電網）

title.en: China-to-Uzbekistan EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备进入乌兹别克斯坦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備進入烏茲別克斯坦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Uzbekistan O'zstandart conformity requirements, O'z DSt / GOST / IEC 61851 expectations, connector compatibility (GB/T 20234 versus IEC 62196), Uzenergo grid-interface issues, EV import policy, 50 Hz deployment, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 evidence.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电设备文件与乌兹别克斯坦O'zstandart合格要求、O'z DSt/GOST/IEC 61851要求、连接器兼容性（GB/T 20234与IEC 62196）、国家电网（Uzenergo）并网接口、电动车进口政策、50Hz部署以及中国GB/T 18487/GB/T 20234/GB/T 27930证据的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電設備文件與烏茲別克斯坦O'zstandart合格要求、O'z DSt/GOST/IEC 61851要求、連接器相容性（GB/T 20234與IEC 62196）、國家電網（Uzenergo）併網介面、電動車進口政策、50Hz部署以及中國GB/T 18487/GB/T 20234/GB/T 27930證據的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, O'zstandart conformity assessment decision, Uzenergo grid-connection approval, customs determination, procurement approval, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Uzbekistan, O'zstandart, O'z DSt, GOST, IEC, grid, customs, tax, and municipal installation requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、O'zstandart合格评定决定、乌兹别克斯坦国家电网（Uzenergo）并网批准、海关裁定、采购批准或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行乌兹别克斯坦、O'zstandart、O'z DSt、GOST、IEC、电网、海关、税务及市政安装要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、O'zstandart合格評定決定、烏茲別克斯坦國家電網（Uzenergo）併網批准、海關裁定、採購批准或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行烏茲別克斯坦、O'zstandart、O'z DSt、GOST、IEC、電網、海關、稅務及市政安裝要求。

answer_first.en: For EV chargers exported from China to Uzbekistan, China GB/T 18487 and GB/T 20234 evidence is useful technical documentation but does not by itself close Uzbekistan market-access gaps. Uzbekistan is not an EAEU member — the domestic conformity route is O'zstandart (Uzbek Agency for Technical Regulation), which issues mandatory conformity certificates under O'z DSt / GOST / IEC-harmonised standards for regulated electrical products. The main checks are O'zstandart mandatory conformity assessment, applicable O'z DSt / GOST / IEC 61851 evidence, connector hardware change from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 (Type 2 AC / CCS2 DC — physically incompatible), 50 Hz suitability, and project-specific Uzenergo or grid-operator coordination for higher-power installations.
answer_first.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备出口乌兹别克斯坦时，中国GB/T 18487和GB/T 20234证据可作为有用技术资料，但本身不能覆盖乌兹别克斯坦市场准入差距。乌兹别克斯坦不是EAEU成员国——国内合格评定路径是O'zstandart（乌兹别克斯坦技术法规署），对受监管电气产品依据O'z DSt/GOST/IEC协调标准颁发强制合格证书。主要核查点包括O'zstandart强制合格评定、适用的O'z DSt/GOST/IEC 61851证据、连接器从GB/T 20234更换为IEC 62196硬件（Type 2交流/CCS2直流——物理上不兼容）、50Hz适配，以及较大功率安装项目的Uzenergo或电网运营商协调事项。
answer_first.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備出口烏茲別克斯坦時，中國GB/T 18487和GB/T 20234證據可作為有用技術資料，但本身不能覆蓋烏茲別克斯坦市場准入差距。烏茲別克斯坦不是EAEU成員國——國內合格評定路徑是O'zstandart（烏茲別克斯坦技術法規署），對受監管電氣產品依據O'z DSt/GOST/IEC協調標準頒發強制合格證書。主要核查點包括O'zstandart強制合格評定、適用的O'z DSt/GOST/IEC 61851證據、連接器從GB/T 20234更換為IEC 62196硬體（Type 2交流/CCS2直流——物理上不相容）、50Hz適配，以及較大功率安裝項目的Uzenergo或電網營運商協調事項。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, customs, tax authority, municipal authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
